select_when: The first answer is probably shallow and the real problem is still underdefined.
Better questions could change the frame by exposing hidden assumptions, causes, or opportunities.
Inquiry still serves a concrete decision, design move, or learning objective rather than free-floating fascination.
The work needs deeper cause-finding, assumption stress-testing, or empathic discovery rather than a quick surface explanation.
avoid_when: Exploration is widening the search space after the relevant uncertainty has already been reduced enough to act.
The team is collecting more facts without a clear purpose, next-step question, or decision it is supposed to serve.

curation_notes.summary: Kept the model centered on deeper questioning, root-cause inquiry, and decision-linked exploration rather than on vague fascination rhetoric.
donor_drops: Did not preserve donor creativity-sprawl because the raw source is already strongest on information-gap closure, five-whys diagnosis, and inquiry tied to action.
open_questions: The source also supports empathy and relationship work, but the operational file stays anchored to question quality and frame change.

select_when.note: The raw source explicitly says curiosity matters when the first answer is shallow, when better questions can change the frame, and when inquiry still serves a concrete decision.

avoid_when.note: The source explicitly warns against curiosity that forgets the decision it is supposed to serve and against boiling-the-ocean fact collection.

input_type.note: The source is explicit about underdefined problems and information gaps; the compact input label is reviewed normalization.

output_type.note: The raw model yields deeper questions and reframed understanding; the output label compresses that into a short intervention type.

reasoning_types.note: The model diagnoses shallow explanation and pushes reflective inquiry, but the taxonomy labels remain reviewed normalization.
